name: volcano
description: Volcano setup and canonical agent instructions for Claude Desktop.
long_description: A lightweight Claude Desktop extension that exposes Volcano setup guidance and canonical agent instructions. It does not implement the full Volcano MCP action surface yet.

tools.name: install-volcano
tools.description: Return the one-step Volcano CLI install/upgrade command for Claude Desktop.

tools.name: volcano_setup_instructions
tools.description: Return the canonical command for installing or upgrading the Volcano CLI.

tools.name: volcano_agent_instructions
tools.description: Return the canonical Volcano agent instructions from this extension's packaged skills directory.

tools.name: volcano_skill_index
tools.description: List the canonical Volcano skills included in this extension's packaged skills directory.
